name: recall-delete-lambda
description: Recall delete Lambda — DELETE /documents/{id}: removes Pinecone vectors, S3 file, DynamoDB record

scripts.zip: rm -f function.zip && zip -r function.zip index.js package.json

_note: No dependencies now — AWS SDK comes from the runtime and Pinecone is called via fetch(). The old @pinecone-database/pinecone dependency is gone, so this can be pasted inline OR shipped as a tiny zip with NO node_modules.
